measured: 2026-07-05, same session, 256 output tokens, greedy where noted
note: Single-GPU points measured on node .3 via persistent tt-server (:8010) and the AR baseline (twotower_dist.py --mode ar). Dual-GPU bench256 is the cross-node NVFP4 v3 result. Single-GPU diffusion vs co-residency confound checked: standalone 28.98 ~= co-resident-with-Omni 29.54, so co-residency is not the bottleneck.

points.prompt: The city of Paris is (coherent, standalone/Omni-off)

verdicts.speed: dual_gpu (38.85) > single_gpu diffusion (28.98) — pick 2 Sparks for speed
verdicts.resource_conservation: single_gpu true diffusion beats single_gpu AR-simulated 1.57x on gen-heavy (28.98 vs 18.44) AND frees a node; AR competitive on short/eval prompts (21.5 vs ~16)
verdicts.tradeoff: NFE-dependent — diffusion wins as generation gets longer/gen-heavy; AR wins on short factual answers
